---
title: "Membership"
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

::: {.membership-page}

::: {.membership-intro}
RC42 Social Psychology welcomes scholars, students, and researchers interested in sociological social psychology.

Membership in RC42 is managed through the International Sociological Association (ISA). To join RC42, register or renew your ISA membership and select **RC42 Social Psychology** as one of your Research Committees.
:::

::: {.membership-layout}

::: {.membership-main-card}

## How to join

1. Become or renew as an ISA member.
2. Select **RC42 Social Psychology** as a Research Committee.
3. Complete your membership through the ISA members portal.

<a href="https://members.isa-sociology.org/login" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="btn-rc42-primary">
  Start your membership &rarr;
</a>

:::

::: {.membership-fees-card}

## Membership dues

Dues for a 4 year period.

| Economies | Regular | Students |
|:---|:---:|:---:|
| Category A | US 25 | US 10 |
| Category B | US 25 | US 10 |
| Category C | US 15 | US 10 |

:::

:::

::: {.membership-contact}
ISA membership includes the option to join Research Committees. For official ISA membership information, fees, and account support, please use the ISA members portal. For questions about RC42 membership, contact [isa-rc42@isa-sociology.org](mailto:isa-rc42@isa-sociology.org).
:::

:::
